chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constitutional Petition No. D-357 of 2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge 1. For orders on office objection as flag A. 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. 08.7.2021 Mr. Khalid Hussain Abro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi Asstt: A.G. ---- Compliance report filed by the Superintendent of Police Kamber Shahdadkot is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that since after filing of instant petition the alleged detenue has surfaced hence under instructions he does not press this petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE
